_comment: Hosts that block automated requests (WAF / anti-bot) but serve fine in a real browser. check-links.js reports URLs from these hosts as 'allowlisted' (verified by hand) rather than failures. Re-open them in a browser periodically to confirm they still resolve.

hosts.reason: Shenzhen Daily e-paper WAF returns 567 to non-browser clients; articles open normally in a browser. These are secondary 'view the original' links — primary links prefer the on-site clip pages.
LinkedIn returns 999 to non-browser clients; the profile is public and loads in a browser.
